how.title: Three steps to your chart
how.sub: No prior knowledge needed. A reading tailored to you, in seconds.
how.step1desc: Add your date (solar or lunar), time, gender and birthplace. We detect your time zone automatically.
how.step2desc: We calculate your Four Pillars precisely — heavenly stems, five elements, ten gods and luck cycles.
how.step3desc: Your chart becomes a clear interpretation — an image for quick readings, a PDF for full reports.

sample.title: Twelve chapters, one destiny.
sample.desc: Every full reading is a complete, beautifully typeset PDF — covering the dimensions that shape a life, written to be read, not decoded.
sample.sec1desc: Your Day Master is Yang Wood (甲), rooted yet exposed. The chart leans slightly weak, favoring Water and Wood to nourish growth and momentum.
sample.sec2desc: A natural strategist drawn to creative or advisory fields. Wealth arrives through expertise and trusted partners rather than speculation.
sample.sec3desc: 2026–2035 enters a Water-strong cycle — a window of clarity, recognition and steady financial expansion.

pricing.title: Start free, go deeper at will
pricing.sub: Quick daily readings are free forever. Pay only for a full report.
pricing.full2: Career, wealth, marriage & health in depth

faqPreview.title: Questions, answered
faqPreview.a1: Bazi — the Four Pillars of Destiny — is a Chinese astrology system based on your exact birth date and time. We calculate your chart precisely, then translate it into a clear, professional, easy-to-read interpretation.
faqPreview.q2: Is the chart accurate, or is it just made up?
faqPreview.a2: The chart itself — stems, branches, elements, ten gods and luck cycles — is computed by a deterministic algorithm, so it is stable and reliable. The interpretation only renders your chart into readable, human-friendly language.
faqPreview.a3: Yes. You get 3 free quick readings every day, no credit card needed. You only pay when you want a full, in-depth report.
faqPreview.q4: What's included in the full report?
faqPreview.a4: Favorable elements & structure, strength of the day master, personality, career, wealth, marriage, health, 10-year luck cycles, recent yearly forecasts, element balancing advice and a lifetime summary — delivered as a beautifully formatted PDF.
faqPreview.q5: Do you support both solar and lunar birth dates?
faqPreview.a5: Yes. You can enter your birth date in either the solar (Gregorian) or lunar calendar, and we handle the conversion and charting for you.
faqPreview.q6: How accurate is the reading? Is there scientific basis?
faqPreview.a6: The Bazi chart calculation is purely mathematical and deterministic based on the traditional Chinese calendar system. The interpretation draws from centuries of Chinese metaphysical tradition.
faqPreview.q7: Does my birth chart determine my fate?
faqPreview.a7: Bazi is a tool for self-understanding, not fatalism. It reveals tendencies and potentials — your choices and efforts shape your actual path.
faqPreview.q8: Is my birth data kept private and secure?
faqPreview.a8: Your birth data is used solely to calculate your chart. We never share personal data with third parties.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: FateLumen respects your privacy. This policy explains what we collect, why, and how we protect it. By using FateLumen you agree to the practices described here.
privacyPage.s1Body: To generate your birth chart and readings we collect the birth details you provide (date, time, place), your account information from Google sign-in (name, email), and payment records processed by our payment partner. We do not store full card numbers.
privacyPage.s2Body: Your birth details are used solely to compute your chart and prepare your reading reports. Account and payment data are used to deliver services, prevent fraud, and provide support. We never sell your personal data.
privacyPage.s3Body: Data is stored on secured servers with access controls and encryption in transit. Generated report files are kept in protected cloud storage. We retain data only as long as needed to provide the service or meet legal obligations.
privacyPage.s4Body: We rely on trusted providers for sign-in, payments, and file delivery. These partners process data only as needed to perform their function and under their own privacy terms.
privacyPage.s5Body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details on our Contact page.
privacyPage.s6Body: Questions about this policy? Reach us at support@fatelumen.com.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: These terms govern your use of FateLumen. Please read them carefully. By accessing the service you agree to be bound by them.
termsPage.s1Body: FateLumen provides Chinese birth-chart calculations and traditional fate readings for personal interest and reflection. Charts are produced by a deterministic algorithm; reading reports are interpretive content.
termsPage.s2Body: All readings are offered for cultural and entertainment purposes. They are not professional advice and should not replace decisions regarding health, finance, legal matters, or relationships.
termsPage.s3Body: You are responsible for keeping your account secure. One active session per account is permitted. You must provide accurate birth details to obtain meaningful results.
termsPage.s4Body: Paid reports and credits are charged at the prices shown at checkout. Because reports are generated digital content, completed orders are generally non-refundable except where required by law.
termsPage.s5Body: You agree not to misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or reproduce our reports for commercial resale without permission.
termsPage.s6Body: We may update these terms as the service evolves. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.sub: We are here to help with readings, orders, and account questions.
contactPage.hours: We aim to reply within two business days.
contactPage.note: For privacy or data requests, please mention it in your message so we can assist you faster.
